title: Save Analysis Rules to Reuse Next Week
summary: Capture filters and analysis settings once, reapply on every new weekly upload.

content.summary: Capture filters and analysis settings once, reapply on every new weekly upload.

body.text: Weekly reporting should not rebuild filters from scratch. Saved rules store your business logic centrally. Complete a full analysis cycle—upload, filter, chart, verify totals. Only then save the rule with a name matching your calendar rhythm.

body.alt: Data visualization on a modern display
body.caption: Data visualization on a modern display. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Complete a full analysis cycle—upload, filter, chart, verify totals. Only then save the rule with a name matching your calendar rhythm.
Share rule names with teammates so everyone applies identical logic to the same Monday export.

items: Test saved rules on last week's file before Monday crunch.
Pair rules with Talk to Data prompts you reuse.

body.text: Upload new file, click apply rule, refresh charts, ask Talk to Data the same standing questions.
Note row count deltas week over week before presenting—filters stay constant while data moves.
Saved rules are the compound interest of Datilio workflows—small setup, large time savings.

meta_description: Capture filters and analysis settings once, reapply on every new weekly upload.
